description: This Kotlin source file defines a utility object 'StringUtils' with methods for joining a linked list into a string and splitting a string into a linked list, utilizing external utility classes 'JoinUtils' and 'SplitUtils'.

classes.name: StringUtils
classes.description: A singleton object providing string manipulation utilities using linked list and string conversions.

methods.name: join
methods.description: Converts a LinkedList into a String by delegating to JoinUtils.join.

methods.name: split
methods.description: Splits a String into a LinkedList by delegating to SplitUtils.split.
